titleStmt.title: SII 39.62: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 62. (A.R. No. 62 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL (INSIDE). JAṬĀVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN SUNDRA-PĀṆḌYADĒVA-YEAR, 7TH, 13TH CENTURY A.D.

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of 100 kuḻi of land as Tirunāmattukkāṇi for celebrating a festival, before the image of Nāchchiyār of Udaiyāṇḍār set up in the shrine of Piḍāriyār Aḻagiya-Nāchchiyār by Arumbākkiḻāṉ Tiruvan Sambandan alias Pāṇḍiyataraiyan who purchased it from the temple and regranted the same. Mentions a coin called Pudukkuḷigai. Signatories like Ellāndalaiyāṉa-pāṇḍya-Brahmārāyaṉ and Vīrapāṇḍya-Brahmarāyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī maṟkittikku mel śrī koccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟkku yāṇ
ṭu 7 vatu tulā nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ puṟamalai nāṭṭu tirukkoḷakkuṭi
Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyaṉ nāyaṉār tirukkoyil śrī rudramāheśvararum tāṉatatomum kalvāyil nāṭṭuk kulacekarapurattu Aru
m pākkiḻāṉ tiruvaṉ campantaṉāṉa pāṇṭiyataraiyar Ittirukkoḷakkuṭiyil piṭāriyār Aḻakiyaṉācciyār tirukkoyilukku Utsama nā
cciyārkku Eḻuntaruḷap paṇṇiṉa nācciyār Utaiyāṇṭāṟku tevatāṉamāy viṟkkiṉṟak kuṭikāṭṭukku caṇḍeśvara vilaipramāṉam paṇṇik
kuṭutta paricāvatu Innāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi Uḷḷūṟ kuṭikkappuravil Ūṟṟukkuḻi perunāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum naṉce
y puṉceyum nattamumn toṭṭamuk kuḷamum kuḷappaṟippum kiṇōkkiya kiṇaṟum mel nokkiya maramum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa samastapraptika
ḷum Uṭpaṭa Ippiṭāriyāṟku tirunāḷ puṟamāka Ippāṇṭiyataraiyar koṇṭu Iṭukaiyil Inta ṉūṟṟukkuḻi vayalukku caṇṭeśvara vilai mutalā
ka vilai niṟceyittu cāttuppaṭi viñceṉac celavukku pāṇṭiyataraiyar pakkal paṟṟiṉa putukkuḷikai ø5 10 Ippaṇam Aympatum paṟṟi Inta Ū
ṟṟukkuḻi vayal caṇṭecura vilaiyāka viṟṟu vilaipratāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom śrī rudra śrī māheṣavararum tāṉattomum Ippaṭi viṟṟa kuṭikkāṭu Ūṟṟu
kkuḻikku perunāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟ kellai virutāk kālaṉ ṟaik meṟkum teṉpāṟ kellaimakku vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai In
kuḻi Ellaikku kiḻakum vaṭapāṟkellai Āka vayallaikkut teṟkum Āka Iṉ canta perutacaṉ kellai laikkaḻi paṭṭa sa tevatā
ṉa kaiyil Inta Ūṟṟukkuḻi vayal pāṇṭiyataraiyar kuṭiniṅkāt tirunāmattuk kāṇiyākap paṟṟi payir tāḻvarapayireṟṟik koḷvarākavum Ippaṭi payireṟṟi varumiṭattu kuḷamum
kiṇaṟum veṭṭi nilamuḷatum palataṭi Orutaṭi Āka merum paḷḷamum Okka Iṭṭut tirutti cantirātittavaṟ kuṭiniṅkāt tirunāmattukkāṇi Āka Uḻutu nilaiyaṭai Āka mel vārampacānam
muṉṟi loṉṟum tiṉaivarakeṉṟu melvāram nāliloṉṟum karumpu koṭṭikkāl karuṇai mañcaḷ Iñci vāḻai vaḻutalai pūcaṉi Uḷḷiṭṭa puṉpayiṟ ceyum payiṟku melvāram Al
loṉṉum Iṭṭu potuvārākavum Ippaṭi melvāram Iṭṭup pokumiṭattu Ivayil kuḷam kiṇaṟu ṇṭu patumāttiyaṉ muṭpaṭa tāme Iṭṭu ceyala p paṇṇi
koḷvārākavum māmaramuḷḷatu pārttu nokki varampiṭṭu potuvārākavum Ippaṭi kuṭi niṅkāt tirunāmattuk kāṇi Āka Iṭṭup pota Ippiṭāriyāṟ
ku tevatāṉam caṇṭeśvara vilaiyāka viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyanāyaṉār tirukkoyil śrī rudra śrīmāheśvararum tāṉattomum
Ippaṭikku Ellān talaiyāṉa pāṇṭiya prahmarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
muṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu virapāṇṭiya brahmarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai parameśvara paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Āḻikuṭi tevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Eḻuttu Ivai nalla maṅkaipākaṉ Eḻuttu
tāruṭaiyan Eḻuttu śrīmāṉ velaḻakiyāṉ Eḻuttu pratāṉam Eḻutiṉeṉ Ikkoyil kāṇi
Uṭaiyāṉ Āṇṭāṉ tiru Aḻakiyāṉ Eḻuttu §
kavum Ippaṭikku kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koṇṭu Aṉupavippārka
Digital edition of SII 39.62 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
